description: read_csv header=0→None treats first row as data, not column names

_meta.explanation: header=None tells pandas there is no header row. Columns get default integer labels (0, 1, ...). All 3 rows ('name,age', 'Alice,30', 'Bob,25') are treated as data rows.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 1. Common source of off-by-one row count and unexpected column names.
